Accommodations

Rooms & Rates

All rooms include free Wi-Fi.

Barkada Room
Barkada Room- SARYA
Perfect for big groups! Fits up to 8 guests with extra beds available for up to 10. Great for barkada trips, family outings, and reunions by the beach.
Air ConFree Wi-FiHot ShowerWith Kitchen UsePrivate BathroomDrinking WaterBeach Access
₱9,000 / night
+₱500 / extra pax  ·  max 10 pax
Sakto Room
Sakto Room- KIPOY
Cozy and just right for small groups or families. Fits up to 4 guests comfortably. Perfect for a quiet getaway near the Zambales shore.

₱5,600 / night

Book the entire property exclusively for your group. Whether it's a family reunion, barkada outing, or a special event — LaZeblin Beach House is all yours.
